task_completion.description: Verify that the Terms and Conditions feature is enabled in the store configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Magento Configuration page (Stores > Configuration > Sales > Checkout > Checkout Options) showing 'Enable Terms and Conditions' set to 'Yes', or a success message indicating the configuration was saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and basic settings of the first agreement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Terms and Conditions grid or edit page showing an agreement with the Condition Name 'Handmade Goods Terms of Service', Status 'Enabled', and Applied 'Manually'.

task_completion.description: Verify the checkbox text and HTML content of the first agreement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agreement edit page showing Checkbox Text 'I agree to the Terms of Service for handmade goods'. The Content field must show HTML mode (or WYSIWYG) containing an <h2> heading 'Terms of Service', and the text must mention 'handmade', '2-4 weeks' (or '2 to 4 weeks'), and '14 days'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and basic settings of the second agreement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Terms and Conditions grid or edit page showing an agreement with the Condition Name 'Privacy and Data Policy', Status 'Enabled', and Applied 'Manually'.

task_completion.description: Verify the checkbox text and HTML content of the second agreement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agreement edit page showing Checkbox Text 'I have read and agree to the Privacy and Data Policy'. The Content field must show HTML mode (or WYSIWYG) containing an <h2> heading 'Privacy Policy', and the text must mention 'data' and 'cookie'.

task_completion.description: Verify that both agreements are assigned to all store views.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Store View' column in the Terms and Conditions grid or the 'Store View' multi-select box on the edit pages showing 'All Store Views' selected for both agreements.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin panel GUI to configure the settings and agreements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Magento Admin web interface being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the agreement content into the actual Magento form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Content should be visible inside the Magento 'Checkbox Text' and 'Content' form fields, not just typed into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Magento interface should look standard without signs of browser developer tools (Inspect Element) being used to fake success messages or grid entries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: 1. 'Enable Terms and Conditions' is located at Stores > Configuration > Sales > Checkout > Checkout Options. 2. Agreement 1 must be named 'Handmade Goods Terms of Service', applied 'Manually', with checkbox text 'I agree to the Terms of Service for handmade goods'. Content must include an <h2 tag with 'Terms of Service', and the words 'handmade', '2-4 weeks' (or '2 to 4 weeks'), and '14 days'. 3. Agreement 2 must be named 'Privacy and Data Policy', applied 'Manually', with checkbox text 'I have read and agree to the Privacy and Data Policy'. Content must include an <h2 tag with 'Privacy Policy', and the words 'data' and 'cookie'. 4. Both agreements must be assigned to 'All Store Views'.
